class.name: BTActionAS_ActivateAbility
class.brief_description: BTAction that activates an Ability System ability by tag.
class.description: A Behavior Tree action that attempts to activate an ability via [ASComponent] using the ability's tag. Returns [constant BT.SUCCESS] if activation succeeds, [constant BT.FAILURE] otherwise. This task respects all ability requirements: tags, cooldowns, costs, and level restrictions.

method.name: get_ability_tag
method.description: Returns the ability tag that will be activated.

method.name: get_activation_level
method.description: Returns the activation level for the ability.

method.name: get_asc_node_path
method.description: Returns the explicit path to the ASComponent. If empty, auto-resolves from agent.

method.name: set_ability_tag
method.description: Sets the ability tag to activate. Must be registered in AbilitySystem.

method.name: set_activation_level
method.description: Sets the activation level for the ability (affects magnitude calculations).

method.name: set_asc_node_path
method.description: Sets explicit path to ASComponent. If empty, searches agent and its children.

members.member: The tag of the ability to activate.
The level at which to activate the ability.
Explicit path to ASComponent. Auto-resolved if empty.
